data.title: Holley May Bear The Brunt Of Ongoing Macroeconomic Challenges, Analyst Highlights Softer Top-line Outlook
data.description: JP Morgan analyst maintains Neutral rating on Holley, citing macroeconomic challenges and a softer revenue outlook despite strong EBITDA guidance.

data.title: Novartis Partner Monte Rosa Therapeutics Touts Positive Data From Early-Stage Study Of Investigational Drug Candidate For Immune-Mediated Disorders
data.description: Monte Rosa's MRT-6160 shows promising Phase 1 results, with Novartis backing its development in a deal that could reach $2.1B in milestone payments.

data.title: JPMorgan: Spire Positioned For Growth With Favorable Missouri Legislation, Rate Case Developments
data.description: JPMorgan upgrades Spire Inc. to Overweight, raises price forecast to $85. Analyst cites regulatory improvements in Missouri and positive factors for increased earnings and growth potential.

data.title: What's Going On With Madison Square Garden Stock Thursday?
data.description: Madison Square Garden Sports Corp. (NYSE:MSGS) stock is trading higher on Thursday after the Boston Celtics were sold for $6.1 billion, raising the bar for NBA team valuations.

data.title: Analysts See Profit Pressure For Williams-Sonoma In 2025, But Brand Strength Remains Intact
data.description: Analysts lower price forecast for Williams-Sonoma after strong Q4 results, with revenue up 8% YoY and EPS beating expectations.
